name: Polish Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a lightly greased skillet, brown the pork chops.
2. Cover, reduce heat and cook until almost tender (about 20 minutes).
3. Add onion and cook until the pork is tender and onions are soft (about 5 minutes).
4. Add tomato sauce, sour cream, dill pickle, sherry, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir gently to combine all ingredients. DO NOT BOIL.
